seoTitle: North Shore vs North St Marys — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Shore and North St Marys. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Shore vs North St Marys: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Shore and North St Marys.
heading: North Shore vs North St Marys — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Shore, New South Wales and North St Marys, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North St Marys has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to North Shore (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Shore or North St Marys safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Shore has a flood risk score of 37/100, while North St Marys scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Shore scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. North St Marys scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Shore or North St Marys?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North St Marys has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
